programmes.show_description: Devon. The next leg of James's trip sees him in Devon, joined by Michelin-starred chef, Simon Hulstone. They check out delicious local mushrooms and cheeses. S1, Ep3
Jersey. James heads to Jersey, where he's joined by pal and award-winning chef, Mark Jordan. They hit the road on mini motorbikes and learn to shuck oysters. S1, Ep4
Flavor World. Guy Fieri dives into cultural cuisine starting in Phoenix, Arizona. Then, he tries authentic Argentine in Boulder, Colorado, and Ethiopian meats in Memphis, Tennessee. S38, Ep15
Bird, Belly And Beef. Guy Fieri seeks out flavourful meat! He checks out Mexican pork sandwiches in Memphis, Tennessee, and rich short ribs in St. Simons Island, Georgia. S38, Ep16
Hearty Handfuls. Guy Fieri digs into hearty handfuls of major flavour, like next-level pizza in Tennessee, tasty tacos in Alberta, and elevated empanadas in Georgia. S38, Ep12
You Called It. Guy is on a mission to try out a variety of delicious treats. First, he heads to Kentucky to try a high-end chef's fresh French bread and then he heads to Minnesota. S9, Ep12
Teleshopping.
Teleshopping.
Teleshopping.
Teleshopping.
Teleshopping.
Teleshopping.
Newark, New Jersey. Casey Webb heads to his home state, New Jersey! He samples an iconic Italian hot dog, a Portuguese pork sandwich and takes part in a taco challenge. S5, Ep5
Brooklyn, New York. Casey Webb's quest takes him to Brooklyn for a barbeque and deli feast. Plus, he samples an Italian seafood staple and takes on a spicy shrimp challenge. S5, Ep6
Yorkshire Coast. The next leg of the Bikers' northern tour is along the Yorkshire coast. The duo begin in Scarborough to meet a seaweed farmer before heading to a vineyard in Aike. S1, Ep2
Quick And Easy: Game Food. Ree Drummond dishes up great ideas for quick and easy game-day meals. She knocks up a five-cheese pepperoni pizza and then a tasty millionaire shortbread. S23, Ep7
Ranchin' And Cookin'. Ree Drummond tackles a busy morning of ranching and get-ahead cooking. She creates the ultimate meatball and polenta casserole and hasselback chicken. S23, Ep8
Rome. In Rome, Jamie tracks down colourful, fresh and easy recipes. Plus, he is inspired to cook his own gnocchi with roasted tomato sauce and rocket pesto. S1, Ep7
Piedmont. Jamie travels to the snow-capped Italian Alps to seek out Piedmont's legendary comfort food. Plus, he cooks dumplings with roasted red onions and crispy pancetta. S1, Ep8
Fruit All Ways. Ina puts a new twist on fruit classics. She learns about desserts such as French nougatine from chef Laura Donnelly and makes wild rice salad and apple chutney. S7, Ep3
Italian At Home. Ina recreates a Florentine feast in East Hampton. There's a mozzarella master class, Italian drinks tray, shop-bought hors d'oeuvres and baked fish in parchment. S7, Ep4
French Week. It is the semi-final and there are just four bakers left, and the all-female semi-finalists have just three French bakes standing between them and a place in the final. S4, Ep9
Class Of 2012. Talking candidly about their experience, the Class of 2012 return to the Bake Off tent to give a special insight to life inside the competition. S4, Ep10
James indulges in the glitz and glamour of St. Tropez. He explores the local seafood market and, in true St. Tropez style, cooks his first dish aboard a yacht. S1, Ep11
James experiences the bustling Provencal port of Marseille. There he discovers local fishermen selling fresh seafood on the back of their boats. S1, Ep12

Taste Of The Sea. Marcus is on the hunt for the freshest catch on the island. He meets up with chef Bocho for some fresh local oysters and a beer on the beach. S1, Ep3
Tasty Tapas. Marcus explores Mallorcan tapas and tries clams, tortilla, and deep-fried courgette flower. He also discovers a local favourite, Vermouth. S1, Ep4
Rick visits a free-range goose farm in Leicester, inspiring him to tackle a roast goose dish. Plus, he visits the oldest eel and pie shop in London. S1, Ep3
Rick experiences the Lake District's quality produce. He cooks a Chinese-inspired wild boar stew. Plus, he meets a farmer who keeps Herdwick sheep. S1, Ep4
All Day Dining. Guy visits a gastropub marrying pork belly with octopus. And in Wyoming, he visits a log cabin-turned restaurant cooking up a banana bread French toast mash-up. S20, Ep5
All Things New York. Guy Fieri gets a taste of NYC. In Eureka, CA, a Bronx-bred pizza maker brings Neapolitan-style pies. In Queens, a filmmaker-turned-chef serves atomic fireballs. S19, Ep2
Big Time Bites. In New York's East Village, Guy Fieri visits the neighbourhood spot plating up a standout burger. In Eureka, CA a popular hangout serves roasted oysters. S19, Ep3
Keepin' It Real. In Miami, Guy visits the Asian fusion spot giving Brussels sprouts a makeover. In Eureka, CA, a soul food spot serves up favourites like jerk fried chicken. S19, Ep4
Cincinnati. Adam head to Cincinnati, Ohio where he devours some grilled cheese sandwiches. Later, he guides namesake Adam through Reuben Challenge at Izzy's, but will he succeed? S1, Ep20
Nascar. Adam heads to Rochester, New York via a NASCAR race. Later, he guides driver Joey Logano through the Atomic Bomb Challenge, involving a three-pound cheeseburger. S1, Ep21
Secret Proposal, Patients And Privacy Please. Buddy gets a visit from Leah, a seven-year-old baker he met in Malaysia. Mauro and Madeline help a young man propose to his sweetheart. S9, Ep15
Enduring Love, An Ending And Edited Out. Buddy recreates a 6-tier wedding cake for Lisa's grandparents' anniversary. Plus, Grace ruffles some feathers with a new training video. S9, Ep16

Rick visits a free-range goose farm in Leicester, inspiring him to tackle a roast goose dish. Plus, he visits the oldest eel and pie shop in London. S1, Ep3
Rick experiences the Lake District's quality produce. He cooks a Chinese-inspired wild boar stew. Plus, he meets a farmer who keeps Herdwick sheep. S1, Ep4
Cumbria. The Bikers tour the Lake District, starting in Dave's hometown Barrow-in-Furness for a trip down memory lane before visiting a bakery loved by the local community. S1, Ep3
Sweet Talk. Ree Drummond celebrates the opening of her new sweet shop. She makes an incredible jewelled divinity and two over-the-top ice cream sundaes. S23, Ep9
Moving House. Ree Drummond makes a dinner to-go for a new cowboy on the ranch. The main course is a chicken jalapeno popper casserole followed by pretzel rolls and watermelon. S23, Ep10
Scallops, Steak, Flat Breads. Chef Jamie Oliver shows off his speedy cooking by preparing seared scallops. Plus, he serves up delicious rib-eye steak and almond puff. S1, Ep1
Tuna, Meatballs, Cookies. Jamie demonstrates fast and tasty cooking by searing a mouth-watering sesame tuna steak. Then, he makes messy meatball buns and chocolate rye cookies. S1, Ep2
Eat Your Greens. Ina shares vegetable ideas for every day of the week. She prepares dishes including spring green risotto with and warm mushroom salad. S7, Ep5
The Adventure Begins. Ina and Jeffrey take a trip to California. For the first meal she cooks chicken with wild mushrooms. Later, she makes baked goat cheese and grilled pork chops. S8, Ep1
A new set of bakers enter the kitchen and their first Signature Challenge is to make a Swiss roll, and then they are faced with the technical challenge of baking a classic cherry cake. S5, Ep1
The remaining 11 bakers must push themselves on flavour to create biscuits that go well with a cheese course. And later, they are asked to make Florentines. S5, Ep2
James's adventure takes him to the Camargue. He learns of the fleur de sel, a delicate salty crust which is harvested in the waters of Aigues Mortes. S1, Ep13
James journeys to Arles, famous for its Roman architecture and home to Vincent Van Gogh. He cooks a delicious dish using food from the local market stalls. S1, Ep14

With the rising cost of food and energy, Jamie Oliver is on a mission to make delicious dishes that won't break the budget. S1, Ep2
Jamie cooks up his version of steak and onion sandwich and shows his way to cook osso buco. Plus, he makes a sticky toffee pudding with his mum. S1, Ep3
Jamie serves up three comfort food classics: chicken kiev, shepherd's pie and spaghetti alle vongole with a non-traditional pink twist. S1, Ep4
